Figure 1: Pipeline of StreamingClaw: Multi-end inputs and the user query are fed into the main–sub agents for perception and decision-making. The instructions produced by the main–sub agents then guide the execution of tools and skills, whose results are fed back to the main–sub agents, forming a closed-loop pipeline of perception–decision–action.
